facts.statement: Session has not begun substantive work — structural framing turn
No domain context exists to inform any constraint analysis
Structural information absence: Party B has not been heard — this is a blocking constraint under one-party-heard rule
Party A has articulated a process concern (lack of consultation) but not substantive interests about children's extracurricular involvement
Cannot design workable notice windows without knowing the parenting schedule (e.g., 48-hour notice is meaningless if transitions happen weekly vs. daily)
Cannot tier approval thresholds without knowing what types of activities are at issue (weekend tournament travel vs. after-school art class require different coordination mechanisms)
